# Port target: `eslint-plugin-cypress`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/cypress-io/eslint-plugin-cypress |
| Submodule | `upstream/eslint-plugin-cypress` @ `v6.4.1` |
| Baseline npm version | `6.4.1` |
| License | MIT |
| Oxlint native support | none â€” port target |
| Rules to port | 13 |

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description | Docs |
|---|------|-------------|------|
| 1 | `assertion-before-screenshot` | require screenshots to be preceded by an assertion | [docs](https://github.com/cypress-io/eslint-plugin-cypress/blob/master/docs/rules/assertion-before-screenshot.md) |
| 2 | `no-and` | enforce .should() over .and() for starting assertion chains | [docs](https://github.com/cypress-io/eslint-plugin-cypress/blob/master/docs/rules/no-and.md) |
| 3 | `no-assigning-return-values` | disallow assigning return values of `cy` calls | [docs](https://github.com/cypress-io/eslint-plugin-cypress/blob/master/docs/rules/no-assigning-return-values.md) |
| 4 | `no-async-before` | disallow using `async`/`await` in Cypress `before` methods | [docs](https://github.com/cypress-io/eslint-plugin-cypress/blob/master/docs/rules/no-async-before.md) |
| 5 | `no-async-tests` | disallow using `async`/`await` in Cypress test cases | [docs](https://github.com/cypress-io/eslint-plugin-cypress/blob/master/docs/rules/no-async-tests.md) |
| 6 | `no-chained-get` | disallow chain of `cy.get()` calls | [docs](https://github.com/cypress-io/eslint-plugin-cypress/blob/master/docs/rules/no-chained-get.md) |
| 7 | `no-debug` | disallow using `cy.debug()` calls | [docs](https://github.com/cypress-io/eslint-plugin-cypress/blob/master/docs/rules/no-debug.md) |
| 8 | `no-force` | disallow using `force: true` with action commands | [docs](https://github.com/cypress-io/eslint-plugin-cypress/blob/master/docs/rules/no-force.md) |
| 9 | `no-pause` | disallow using `cy.pause()` calls | [docs](https://github.com/cypress-io/eslint-plugin-cypress/blob/master/docs/rules/no-pause.md) |
| 10 | `no-unnecessary-waiting` | disallow waiting for arbitrary time periods | [docs](https://github.com/cypress-io/eslint-plugin-cypress/blob/master/docs/rules/no-unnecessary-waiting.md) |
| 11 | `no-xpath` | disallow using `cy.xpath()` calls | [docs](https://github.com/cypress-io/eslint-plugin-cypress/blob/master/docs/rules/no-xpath.md) |
| 12 | `require-data-selectors` | require `data-*` attribute selectors | [docs](https://github.com/cypress-io/eslint-plugin-cypress/blob/master/docs/rules/require-data-selectors.md) |
| 13 | `unsafe-to-chain-command` |  | [docs](https://github.com/cypress-io/eslint-plugin-cypress/blob/master/docs/rules/unsafe-to-chain-command.md) |
